notes:
🚀 v35.7 - Full Audit Fixes & System Hardening (v54)

✅ OBD: Fixed PID bitmap loop bug and consecutiveTimeouts initialization.
✅ OBD: Ensured pending commands resolve on disconnect to prevent UI hangs.
✅ NATIVE: Added re-entry protection to connect() and improved resource cleanup.
✅ UI: Sensors are now cleared (---) immediately upon module disconnect.
✅ UI: Fixed Junctek SOC fallback logic to respect real 0% readings.
✅ UI: Added cross-check validation for alarm thresholds (Low > Critical).
